dataset: FAA Chart Supplement - San Francisco International Airport

pi_items.source: AirNav (FAA), AOPA, multiple aviation databases - all confirm KSFO is San Francisco International Airport

pi_items.verified_value: KSFO has 4 runways: 10L/28R (11870 ft), 10R/28L (11381 ft), 01L/19R (7650 ft), 01R/19L (8650 ft). The longest is 10L/28R. All list entries refer to the same runway.

privileged_info_summary: KSFO (San Francisco International Airport) has four runways. The longest runway is 10L/28R with a length of exactly 11,870 feet and 200 feet wide. This is confirmed by official FAA data sources including AirNav. The other three runways are: 10R/28L (11,381 ft), 01R/19L (8,650 ft), and 01L/19R (7,650 ft). The task metadata correctly identifies the longest runway identifier (10L/28R) and its exact length (11,870 ft) as claimed by the FAA Chart Supplement data that Avare uses.
